name: Rajdeep Singh Parihar
metaDescription: Biomedical Engineering student exploring healthcare technology, embedded systems, medical innovation, and research-driven engineering projects.

hero.headline: Exploring Healthcare, Electronics, and Intelligent Systems
hero.intro: I am a Biomedical Engineering student passionate about healthcare technology, embedded systems, and engineering innovation. This portfolio showcases my projects, research, hackathon experiences, and ongoing journey in building solutions that bridge technology and human well-being.

summary: Exploring the intersection of healthcare, electronics, and intelligent systems through projects, research, and continuous learning.
bio: I am a Biomedical Engineering student at Lovely Professional University with a growing interest in healthcare technology, embedded systems, and intelligent engineering solutions. My curiosity lies in understanding how technology can solve practical problems and improve the way people interact with healthcare systems.

I enjoy working on projects that combine electronics, software, and biomedical concepts. From embedded systems and IoT-based prototypes to healthcare-focused digital solutions, I am particularly interested in building technologies that are functional, accessible, and capable of creating real-world impact. Through hackathons, technical competitions, and independent projects, I continuously expand my skills while exploring new areas of engineering and innovation.

Beyond academics, I am an NCC Naval Wing Cadet who values discipline, leadership, and continuous self-improvement. I believe meaningful engineering begins with understanding a problem deeply before designing a solution. This portfolio documents my projects, research, achievements, and ongoing journey as I work toward contributing to the future of healthcare and technology.

contact.headline: Get In Touch
contact.intro: Project collaborations, internships, research opportunities, and technical discussions.
